mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id AS sessionId, event_type AS eventType, payload_json AS payloadJson, occurred_at AS occurredAt FROM session_event WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY occurred_at, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO session_event ( session_id, event_type, payload_json, occurred_at ) VALUES ( #{row.sessionId}, #{row.eventType}, #{row.payloadJson}, #{row.occurredAt} )
